calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Rueppel appeared by zoom for Paul Bruno (Petitioner).

Mr. Rueppel stated that Mr. Bruno has not been reachable, that he has been serving Mr. Bruno since Spring, that his Secretary confirmed Mr. Bruno's address and informed him that they would no longer be representing him, and that they haven't had any contact with him since then. The Court noted that notice is proper and that no one has objected. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
